fab_section_md:
- Ronnel Arryn was the boy king of the Eyrie, son of Sharra (fab-aegons-conquest-03:125)
- He was found on Visenya's knee begging to fly, and after three circuits of the Giant's Lance he landed a lord (fab-aegons-conquest-03:275)
identity_line: Ronnel Arryn was the boy king of the Eyrie, son of Sharra.

fab_section_md:
- Manfred Hightower, Lord of Oldtown, was cautious and godly (fab-aegons-conquest-03:289)
- Warned by the High Septon's vision, he opened Oldtown's gates and offered his sword, city, and oath (fab-aegons-conquest-03:289)
- Some say he also offered his youngest daughter's hand, which Aegon declined (fab-aegons-conquest-03:289)
identity_line: Manfred Hightower, Lord of Oldtown, was cautious and godly.

fab_section_md:
- The High Septon, Father of the Faithful, locked himself in the Starry Sept for seven days seeking guidance (fab-aegons-conquest-03:287)
- The Crone showed him that resisting Aegon would see Oldtown burn, and he later anointed Aegon with the seven oils (fab-aegons-conquest-03:291)
identity_line: High Septon — The High Septon, Father of the Faithful, locked himself in the Starry Sept for seven days seeking guidance.

fab_section_md:
- Balerion the Black Dread was the sole survivor of the five dragons Aenar brought from Valyria and served as Aegon's mount (fab-aegons-conquest-03:39)
- His black fire, shot through with red, melted the towers of Harrenhal (fab-aegons-conquest-03:169)
identity_line: Balerion the Black Dread was the sole survivor of the five dragons Aenar brought from Valyria and served as Aegon's mount.
